_schema.description: Moon sign (Rashi) interpretations - represents emotional nature, mind, mother, subconscious patterns. The Moon sign is the single most important factor in Vedic emotional interpretation.
_schema.usage: Inject these patterns into LLM context when describing how user feels, processes emotions, or relates emotionally.

themes: quick to feel, quick to forget
emotional_patterns: feels emotions intensely but briefly
reacts before reflecting
needs to express feelings physically or through action
frustrated when emotions are suppressed
courageous in vulnerability but impatient with slow processing
relationship_patterns: wants partners who match their energy
loses interest if challenged emotionally for too long
shows love through bold gestures, not gentle words
career_patterns: thrives in leadership and competitive environments
needs autonomy at work
burns out in slow, bureaucratic systems

themes: Moon is exalted here - deeply nurturing
emotional_patterns: processes feelings slowly and deeply
needs physical comfort and beauty to feel safe
stubborn once emotions settle in
extremely loyal but hard to win back if betrayed
finds peace in routine, food, music, nature
relationship_patterns: shows love through gifts, food, touch, and presence
slow to commit but deeply committed once decided
career_patterns: draws toward finance, arts, hospitality, agriculture
thrives with consistent income and tangible results
builds wealth slowly and steadily
strengths: Moon is exalted - natural healer of others
spiritual_patterns: connects to divine through senses, beauty, and earth

emotional_patterns: rationalizes feelings before feeling them
talks through emotions to understand them
easily distracted from emotional depth
shifts moods quickly - can feel two things at once
uses humor to deflect heavy feelings
relationship_patterns: may struggle with deep emotional intimacy
career_patterns: excels in writing, communication, teaching, sales, tech
needs variety in work
good at juggling multiple projects
spiritual_patterns: seeks through study, conversation, multiple paths

emotional_patterns: feels everything in the body, not just the mind
absorbs others' emotions like a sponge
retreats into shell when hurt
powerful intuition - knows things without being told
carries family and ancestral emotional patterns
relationship_patterns: nurtures through food, care, memory of small details
can be clingy or moody when insecure
highly devoted to family and chosen family
career_patterns: draws toward caregiving, real estate, hospitality, healing, food
needs emotional connection to work
succeeds where empathy is an asset
strengths: Moon at home - emotional mastery available
challenges: difficulty letting go of the past
spiritual_patterns: devotional path, connection to divine feminine, mother-figure spirituality

emotional_patterns: wears emotions openly and dramatically
needs to feel seen and valued
wounded ego heals slowly
generous when appreciated, withdrawn when ignored
feels best when expressing creatively
relationship_patterns: needs admiration and respect from partner
career_patterns: natural leadership in performance, politics, creative direction
needs visibility in work
thrives with applause and recognition
spiritual_patterns: devotion through expression, sun-based, divine purpose orientation

emotional_patterns: overthinks emotions instead of feeling them
struggles to relax mentally
often worries internally without showing it outside
finds peace through routine, cleanliness, helping others
self-critical inner voice rarely quiets
relationship_patterns: shows love through practical help and remembering details
wants a partner they can improve with
may seem cold but feels deeply
career_patterns: excels in detail-oriented work - analysis, healthcare, writing, editing
needs systems and competence around them
often the dependable one in a team
spiritual_patterns: path of seva (service), discipline, mantra, mental purification

emotional_patterns: weighs emotions before expressing them
avoids conflict even at emotional cost
needs beauty and balance in surroundings to feel okay
may suppress true feelings to keep peace
indecisive when emotionally torn
relationship_patterns: struggles when alone for too long
career_patterns: draws toward law, design, diplomacy, counseling, beauty industries
needs collaborative environments
good at mediating

themes: Moon is debilitated here - emotional turbulence
emotional_patterns: feels everything at maximum intensity
doesn't trust easily but loves deeply once trust is given
holds grudges and processes betrayal slowly
drawn to emotional extremes - all or nothing
secretive about inner world
Moon is debilitated here - inner peace must be earned through transformation
relationship_patterns: intense bonding - merges deeply with partner
loyal to the end or completely cut off
career_patterns: draws toward psychology, occult, research, surgery, investigation
thrives in transformative work
uncovers what others miss
spiritual_patterns: tantric path, transformation through shadow work, kundalini awakening

emotional_patterns: naturally optimistic even in hard times
processes feelings through meaning-making and philosophy
needs freedom to feel emotionally safe
uncomfortable with emotional confinement
looks for the bigger picture in every feeling
relationship_patterns: needs adventure and growth with partner
honest sometimes to the point of bluntness
loves through shared exploration and learning
career_patterns: draws toward teaching, travel, law, publishing, spirituality
needs purpose and meaning in work
thrives with mentors and as a mentor
spiritual_patterns: path of wisdom, dharma, teaching, pilgrimage

emotional_patterns: represses emotions for the sake of duty
feels older than their age emotionally
fears vulnerability as weakness
warms up slowly but stays loyal long
tends toward melancholy in private
relationship_patterns: shows love through reliability and provision
needs partner who respects their work and ambition
career_patterns: ambitious - long-term thinking
thrives in structure, business, government, traditional careers
rises through patience and effort
spiritual_patterns: path of discipline, karma yoga, monk-like restraint

emotional_patterns: intellectualizes emotions to manage them
feels deeply but expresses through ideas, not tears
uncomfortable with conventional emotional displays
needs space and freedom to feel safe
feels different from others and accepts it
career_patterns: draws toward technology, social causes, science, innovation
thrives in unconventional roles
future-oriented thinker
spiritual_patterns: path of universal love, service to humanity, jnana yoga

emotional_patterns: absorbs others' emotions without filter
lives partly in dreams, imagination, or fantasy
highly compassionate but easily overwhelmed
intuitive to the point of psychic awareness
may escape pain through fantasy, art, or substances
relationship_patterns: loves unconditionally - sometimes loses self in partner
attracts wounded souls and rescuer dynamics
career_patterns: draws toward art, music, healing, spirituality, behind-the-scenes work
thrives in creative and compassionate fields
struggles in cutthroat environments
spiritual_patterns: bhakti (devotion), surrender, mystical union, dissolution of ego
